exploration_notes: Created StarlarkRuleEvalTest.java with 16 tests covering: (1) basic rule instantiation with required attributes using both direct RuleClass.createRule and RuleFactory.createAndAddRule, (2) missing mandatory attribute error reporting for single and multiple missing attributes, (3) attribute type validation including wrong type (string vs list), unknown attributes, and type access mismatches, (4) default attribute values for string/int/bool/list/label types and explicit override of defaults, (5) v
